scripts.build: npm run build --prefix packages/rich-editor && npm run build --prefix apps/demo
scripts.build:pages: npm run build --prefix packages/rich-editor && npm run build:pages --prefix apps/demo
scripts.publish:lib: npm run test --workspace=@rinsvent/rich-editor && npm run build --workspace=@rinsvent/rich-editor && npm publish --workspace=@rinsvent/rich-editor --ignore-scripts
